name: Detection: C2 beaconing — summarize aggregates to per-IP view, dropping all required entity columns

input.query:
let DeviceThreshold = 5;
let ConnectionThreshold = 25;
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where not(ipv4_is_private(RemoteIP))
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccessAggregatedReport'
| extend Connections = toint(parse_json(AdditionalFields).uniqueEventsAggregated)
| summarize TotalConnections = sum(Connections), UniqueDevices = dcount(DeviceId), Domains = make_set(RemoteUrl), AvgConnections = avg(Connections) by RemoteIP
| where AvgConnections >= ConnectionThreshold and UniqueDevices <= DeviceThreshold
| project RemoteIP, TotalConnections, UniqueDevices, Domains, AvgConnections
